failure_modes.mode: Inadequate mixing leading to hot spots
failure_modes.cause: Da_mass=59.97 with r_mix=1.17 indicates poor mixing in laminar flow at Re=178
failure_modes.mitigation: Install static mixers every 2m or increase Re to >2000 for turbulent mixing

failure_modes.cause: Exothermic cycloaddition with poor heat removal in long narrow tubing at 120°C
failure_modes.mitigation: Segment coil into 3x14m sections with intermediate cooling or increase d to 1.0mm

failure_modes.cause: TBAB/EG eutectic may crystallize if local cooling occurs below melting point
failure_modes.mitigation: Heat trace entire flow path and maintain T > 130°C with thermal insulation

single_points_of_failure: BPR valve — blockage stops all flow
Single 42.75m coil — any blockage kills entire reaction
validation_experiments: RTD tracer study with pulse injection to measure actual mixing time vs theoretical tau=2.0 min
Temperature mapping along coil length under reaction conditions to identify hot spot formation
DES flow stability test: pump pure TBAB/EG at Q=4.2 mL/min for 4h monitoring pressure spikes
